name: world-wall-reset
description: Verify the five-minute world reset contract: wall blocks restore, physics debris clears, player stats remain, and all players return to spawn.

args.code: local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local c=game.ServerStorage:WaitForChild('PunchWallAutomation') c:Invoke('Reset') c:Invoke('SetStats',{Power=987,Coins=654,Depth=12,Score=3456,WallLevel=12}) local p=game.Players:GetPlayers()[1] local root=workspace.PunchWallRPG local blocks=root['Depth Blocks'] local target=blocks:FindFirstChild('DepthBlock_L001_C06_R01') assert(target,'missing reset target') c:Invoke('BreakDepthBlock',{layer=1,column=6,row=1},100) c:Invoke('SetStats',{Power=987,Coins=654,Depth=12,Score=3456,WallLevel=12}) p.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame=CFrame.new(150,8,60) local result=c:Invoke('ResetWorld') task.wait(0.25) local intact,broken,detached=0,0,0 for _,b in ipairs(blocks:GetChildren()) do if b:GetAttribute('Broken') then broken+=1 elseif b:GetAttribute('StructuralDetached') then detached+=1 elseif b.Anchored and b.CanCollide then intact+=1 end end local hrp=p.Character.HumanoidRootPart local spawn=root:FindFirstChild('Punch Rookie Spawn') return H:JSONEncode({interval=root:GetAttribute('WorldResetInterval'),resetCount=root:GetAttribute('WorldResetCount'),teleported=result.teleportedPlayers,statsPower=p.leaderstats.Power.Value,statsCoins=p.leaderstats.Coins.Value,statsDepth=p.leaderstats.Depth.Value,broken=broken,detached=detached,intact=intact,fragments=#root['Depth Physics Debris']:GetChildren(),spawnDistance=(hrp.Position-spawn.Position).Magnitude})

steps.label: reset blocks and return player without wiping stats
